name: Nexus Coffee & Creative

seo.title: Nexus Coffee & Creative — Coffee Shop in Argenta NLR | Metro Little Rock
seo.description: Nexus Coffee & Creative is Argenta's community coffee shop — specialty espresso, a gallery wall that rotates monthly, and a workspace vibe that welcomes lingering.

address: 622 Main St, North Little Rock, AR 72114
description: Nexus Coffee sits at the center of the Argenta Arts District and functions as the neighborhood's living room — a specialty espresso bar with gallery walls that rotate monthly, a community board that tracks every arts event in the district, and a layout that encourages you to stay longer than you planned. The coffee program is serious: single-origin pour-overs alongside a full espresso menu, with pastries from a rotating cast of local bakers. The space hosts events, art openings, and the occasional acoustic performance on First Thursdays. If you want to understand the Argenta arts community, spend a morning here.
must_try_items: Single-origin pour-over (ask what's on the bar)
